component.name: Vulkan HDR WSI Layer
component.summary: Vulkan layer providing HDR color management on Wayland compositors

description.p: A Vulkan implicit layer that implements VK_EXT_swapchain_colorspace and VK_EXT_hdr_metadata for Wayland compositors supporting color management protocols. Required for HDR output with NVIDIA graphics cards, which at current time lacks native Wayland color management. Not needed for Mesa-based drivers (AMD/Intel) on Mesa 25.1+.
